title: SSRF, DNS Rebinding, Injection, Response Validation, and Least Authority · Go Client Systems · Execution Trace: Ssrf Destination Policy
summary: An image-import service accepts tenant URLs and must stop SSRF, DNS rebinding, unsafe redirects, hostile content, and secret-bearing logs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http go ssrf destination policy increment in a Go 1.26 net/http defense-in-depth outbound request policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Allow-list required schemes, ports, hosts, and destinations and enforce network egress limits for server-side fetching. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Validate environment, file, runtime, and secret-provider configuration with precedence, rotation, and safe diagnostics. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
